hypothesis: Augmenting the DPO framework with uncertainty-aware, multi-fidelity physics feedback that blends Thermo-Calc outputs with a fast surrogate predictor of BCC/B2 phase coexistence and lattice mismatch—optimized via an uncertainty-weighted DPO objective—will increase mean reward and broaden exploration to more diverse, synthesizable alloy candidates than Thermo-Calc-only feedback.
